entry.name: a2a-agent-discovery
entry.description: Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol is an open standard designed to facilitate communication and interoperability between independent, potentially opaque AI agent systems. This App-ID covers the agent discovery phase of A2A traffic where A2A servers present their agent cards to the clients.

entry.name: abb-tunnel
entry.description: The ABB 800xA architecture consists of varied nodes, such as Domain Server, Connectivity Server, Application servers, Operator Stations and the Aspect Server, each fulfilling different roles. Communication between ABB controllers, workstations, and nodes can be encapsulated in an ABB tunnel.

entry.name: abilityai
entry.description: Ability AI provides AI systems for marketing and business operations including AI Agent Hub, a library of AI agents for business process automation.

entry.name: advantech-adam-webserver
entry.description: Advantech Remote I/O devices are powerful tools for industrial automation and data acquisition. These modules allow for flexible and scalable remote monitoring and control in various industrial settings. The Advantech ADAM Web Server allows for configuration and access to live data and diagnostics of its I/O devices.

entry.name: agencii
entry.description: Agencii AI is a platform built on the Agency Swarm framework, designed for AI developers and AI agencies to create and deploy custom AI agents tailored to client needs.

entry.name: agentops
entry.description: AgentOps helps developers build, evaluate, and monitor AI agents, from prototype to production.

entry.name: air-vpn
entry.description: AirVPN is a privacy-centric, technically oriented virtual private network (VPN) service.

entry.name: aitv
entry.description: AITV is a platform that streams AI companions for creators, brands, and communities.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-lingma
entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Lingma, an AI coding assistant, offers features like code completion, generation, and cross-context awareness.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-qianwen-download
entry.description: Tongyi Qianwen, also known as Qwen, is a family of large language models developed by Alibaba Cloud.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-qianwen-base
entry.description: Tongyi Qianwen, also known as Qwen, is a family of large language models developed by Alibaba Cloud.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-qianwen
entry.description: Tongyi Qianwen, also known as Qwen, is a family of large language models developed by Alibaba Cloud.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-qianwen-upload
entry.description: Tongyi Qianwen, also known as Qwen, is a family of large language models developed by Alibaba Cloud.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-tingwu-create
entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Tingwu is an AI work and study assistant developed by Alibaba Cloud. Powered by large language models, it can convert speech to text and analyze content in audios and videos.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-tingwu-base
entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Tingwu is an AI work and study assistant developed by Alibaba Cloud. Powered by large language models, it can convert speech to text and analyze content in audios and videos.

entry.name: alibaba-tongyi-tingwu
entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Tingwu is an AI work and study assistant developed by Alibaba Cloud. Powered by large language models, it can convert speech to text and analyze content in audios and videos.

entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Tingwu is an AI work and study assistant developed by Alibaba Cloud. Powered by large language models, it can convert speech to text and analyze content in audios and videos.

entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Tingwu is an AI work and study assistant developed by Alibaba Cloud. Powered by large language models, it can convert speech to text and analyze content in audios and videos.

entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Tingwu is an AI work and study assistant developed by Alibaba Cloud. Powered by large language models, it can convert speech to text and analyze content in audios and videos.

entry.description: Alibaba Tongyi Tingwu is an AI work and study assistant developed by Alibaba Cloud. Powered by large language models, it can convert speech to text and analyze content in audios and videos.

entry.name: amazon-s3-download
entry.description: Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service) is an online file storage web service offered by Amazon Web Services.

entry.name: amazon-s3-base
entry.description: Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service) is an online file storage web service offered by Amazon Web Services.

entry.name: amazon-s3
entry.description: Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service) is an online file storage web service offered by Amazon Web Services.

entry.name: amazon-s3-upload
entry.description: Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service) is an online file storage web service offered by Amazon Web Services.

entry.name: amdt-octoplant-agent
entry.description: AMDT Octoplant is a comprehensive data management platform for industrial automation environments, offering solutions for device management, backups, version control, and security. Octoplant helps businesses maintain data consistency, enhance security, and improve operational efficiency. Octoplant agents communicate with the Octoplant server and provides decentralized job execution to increase performance and load distribution during job execution.

entry.name: amdt-octoplant-base
entry.description: AMDT Octoplant is a comprehensive data management platform for industrial automation environments, offering solutions for device management, backups, version control, and security. Octoplant helps businesses maintain data consistency, enhance security, and improve operational efficiency.

entry.name: amdt-octoplant
entry.description: AMDT Octoplant is a comprehensive data management platform for industrial automation environments, offering solutions for device management, backups, version control, and security. Octoplant helps businesses maintain data consistency, enhance security, and improve operational efficiency.

entry.name: amdt-octoplant-server
entry.description: AMDT Octoplant is a comprehensive data management platform for industrial automation environments, offering solutions for device management, backups, version control, and security. Octoplant helps businesses maintain data consistency, enhance security, and improve operational efficiency. The Octoplant server is used to communicate with octoplant clients, agents and other octoplant servers.

entry.name: ap2
entry.description: Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) is an open, shared protocol that provides a common language for secure, compliant transactions between agents and merchants.

entry.name: attest-autoreader
entry.description: Attest is a brand name trademarked by 3M for a line of sterilization assurance products. The Auto-reader is designed to incubate and read Attest biological indicators, which are used to monitor the efficacy of sterilization processes.

entry.name: axis-camera-station-web-client
entry.description: AXIS Camera Station Pro is video management software that allows users to view live video, search and export recordings, and manage access control. The AXIS Camera Station Pro web client gives users access to AXIS Camera Station Pro recordings and live video in their web browser.

entry.name: azure-storage-accounts-create
entry.description: An Azure Storage Account is a cloud-based storage solution that enables users to store data objects such as blobs, queues, tables, and files.

entry.name: azure-storage-accounts-base
entry.description: An Azure Storage Account is a cloud-based storage solution that enables users to store data objects such as blobs, queues, tables, and files.

entry.name: azure-storage-accounts
entry.description: An Azure Storage Account is a cloud-based storage solution that enables users to store data objects such as blobs, queues, tables, and files.

entry.name: azure-storage-accounts-delete
entry.description: An Azure Storage Account is a cloud-based storage solution that enables users to store data objects such as blobs, queues, tables, and files.

entry.name: azure-storage-accounts-download
entry.description: An Azure Storage Account is a cloud-based storage solution that enables users to store data objects such as blobs, queues, tables, and files.

entry.name: azure-storage-accounts-post
entry.description: An Azure Storage Account is a cloud-based storage solution that enables users to store data objects such as blobs, queues, tables, and files.

entry.name: azure-storage-accounts-upload
entry.description: An Azure Storage Account is a cloud-based storage solution that enables users to store data objects such as blobs, queues, tables, and files.

entry.name: baidu-yiyan
entry.description: Yiyan is Baidu's generative AI chatbot powered by its ERNIE large language model, designed for natural conversations, content creation, and image generation. It serves as China's main alternative to ChatGPT, optimized for Chinese language and cultural context.

entry.name: balluff-io-link-discovery
entry.description: Balluff specializes in sensor and automation solutions. Balluff IO-Link masters have built-in web server functionality that supports IP address configuration and network monitoring, as well as the ability to configure, parameterize, and monitor IO-Link devices and provide diagnostic information. The Balluff IO-Link discovery protocol identifies the IO-Link devices at the sensor/actuator level.

entry.name: balluff-optical-sensorapp
entry.description: Balluff's SensorApp software offers auto setup features and convenient optical sensor configuration and monitoring options via any web browser.

entry.name: beijer-ix-hmi
entry.description: iX HMI Software from Beijer Electronics combines high quality graphics with pre-styled objects and intuitive operation to allow for communication with an extensive list of PLC brands.

entry.name: beijer-nexto-xpress-webserver
entry.description: Beijer Nexto Xpress is a powerful compact Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) in the Nexto Series family of controllers and I/O modules. Nexto Xpress delivers high-speed processing power in a compact design with embedded I/O. Nexto Xpress controllers provide access to its operation states through a web server.

entry.name: chathelp
entry.description: ChatHelp is an AI chatbot that can be trained as an assistant for business, work, or study.

entry.name: cisco-xe-web-ui
entry.description: Cisco IOS XE Web UI is an embedded, browser-based graphical user interface (GUI) designed for configuring, managing, and monitoring Cisco networking devices (routers, switches) without requiring command-line interface (CLI) expertise.

entry.name: codegen
entry.description: Codegen is an expert software engineering agent that helps developer teams build incredible software.

entry.name: codesys-runtime-v2
entry.description: CODESYS Runtime V2 converts any embedded or PC-based device into an IEC 61131-3-compliant industrial controller. This runtime system includes add-on functionality so that your controller can communicate with other components in the automation environment.

entry.name: coze
entry.description: Coze is a next-generation AI application and chatbot development platform. It is designed to be accessible to users regardless of their programming experience. The platform allows users to create and implement AI applications and chatbots, making it a versatile tool for various digital interactions.

entry.name: cursor
entry.description: Cursor is an AI-assisted integrated development environment for Windows, macOS, and Linux. It is a fork of Visual Studio Code with additional AI features.

entry.name: danfoss-vacon-nxp-protocol
entry.description: VACON NCDrive is designed for commissioning, parameterization, monitoring, and diagnostics of VACON NXP family drives. VACON NCIPConfig is used for managing Ethernet-based network options for VACON NXP communication option cards. The VACON NXP protocol is used for communication between NXP devices and these software.

entry.name: desoutter-cvi-pc2000
entry.description: CVI PC2000 is Desoutter's comprehensive software solution to configure and manage CVIC, CVIR and CVIL controllers and tools. The software allows users to configure tightening strategies, accessories, and Ethernet or fieldbus communication networks. It can also be used to view tightening data or maintenance requirements.

entry.name: dify-ai
entry.description: Dify is an open-source, next-generation development platform for building and operating generative AI applications. It allows users to create Assistants API and GPTs based on any Language Model (LLM). The platform features an intuitive interface that combines AI workflow, RAG pipeline, agent capabilities, and model management, making it easier for developers to create and manage AI applications.

entry.name: dlptest
entry.description: DLPTest is a free online resource used by IT and security professionals to test Data Loss Prevention (DLP) software.

entry.name: dot-ai-post
entry.description: Dot is an AI-powered conversational analytics assistant and a smart data agent designed to help teams query and analyze their data warehouses using natural language.

entry.name: dot-ai-base
entry.description: Dot is an AI-powered conversational analytics assistant and a smart data agent designed to help teams query and analyze their data warehouses using natural language.

entry.name: dot-ai
entry.description: Dot is an AI-powered conversational analytics assistant and a smart data agent designed to help teams query and analyze their data warehouses using natural language.

entry.name: dot-ai-upload
entry.description: Dot is an AI-powered conversational analytics assistant and a smart data agent designed to help teams query and analyze their data warehouses using natural language.

entry.name: doubao
entry.description: Doubao is an AI chat assistant, intelligent conversation Q&A assistant, and all-purpose tool for writing, copywriting, translation, emotional companionship, and programming. Doubao can answer users' questions, provide inspiration, assist in creation, and chat with users about any topic.

entry.name: duckie-create
entry.description: Duckie is a no-code platform for customer support teams to build and deploy AI agents to resolve tickets.

entry.name: duckie-base
entry.description: Duckie is a no-code platform for customer support teams to build and deploy AI agents to resolve tickets.

entry.name: duckie
entry.description: Duckie is a no-code platform for customer support teams to build and deploy AI agents to resolve tickets.

entry.name: duckie-delete
entry.description: Duckie is a no-code platform for customer support teams to build and deploy AI agents to resolve tickets.

entry.name: duckie-edit
entry.description: Duckie is a no-code platform for customer support teams to build and deploy AI agents to resolve tickets.

entry.name: duckie-invite
entry.description: Duckie is a no-code platform for customer support teams to build and deploy AI agents to resolve tickets.

entry.name: emerson-ecmp
entry.description: Developed by Emerson Industrial Automation (Control Techniques Division) eCMP (Extensible Control & Management Protocol) is a protocol used for setting up and controlling devices in a factory automation system.

entry.name: emerson-vim-discovery
entry.description: The Emerson Virtual I/O module (VIM) is a hardware interface designed to simulate I/O cards and digital bus field devices for Emerson's DeltaV distributed control systems (DCS). The discovery protocol is used to locate devices on the network.

entry.name: fast-speed-test
entry.description: FAST Internet Speed Test is an internet connectivity speed test powered by Netflix.

entry.name: festo-automation-suite-scan
entry.description: Festo Automation Suite Scan is a feature that automatically scans your local network for connected Festo devices. When activated, it displays a list of found devices, allowing users to perform basic actions like checking device details, updating firmware, changing network settings, or adding the device to a project.

entry.name: festo-cmmt-plug-in
entry.description: The Festo CMMT plugin is a software add-on for the Festo Automation Suite that enables the configuration, commissioning, and diagnostics of CMMT-series servo drives, such as the CMMT-ST and CMMT-AS. It provides a user-friendly interface to connect to the drive, set parameters, perform automatic setups with a wizard, and access an expert view for advanced control.

entry.name: festo-servo-drive-webserver
entry.description: A Festo Servo Drive, like the CMMT-AS model, is a high-precision electronic controller. Its main job is to take low-level commands (for position, speed, or torque) from a main controller (PLC) and provide the high power needed to run a servo motor accurately using a closed-loop feedback system. The Festo Automation Suite is an integrated software platform designed for configuring, commissioning, and maintaining Festo automation products. It allows users to connect to Festo devices for tasks such as diagnostics, firmware updates, and parameterization.

entry.name: fetchai-agentverse
entry.description: Agentverse is a cloud-based platform designed for creating, testing, and deploying customizable autonomous agents. It offers tools and libraries for building, training, and integrating agents into various systems.

entry.name: fetchai-asione
entry.description: ASI:One is a Web3-native Large Language Model (LLM) designed specifically for agentic AI. It is optimized for the complex interactions and autonomous decision-making required by AI agents operating within a decentralized environment.

entry.name: fresenius-kabi-agilia-connect
entry.description: Fresenius Kabi Agilia Connect family of volumetric and syringe pumps are medical devices capable of delivering continuous and very specific amounts of fluids at very slow to very fast rates.

entry.name: ge-mars-cicbedsync
entry.description: The CIC interface allows the MARS system to acquire full disclosure (FD) data from bedside monitors connected to the GE Healthcare CARESCAPE Monitoring Network.

entry.name: gitlab-duo
entry.description: Gitlab Duo is an assistant AI for repos hosted under the gitlab domain. It features code suggestion in browser and IDE as well as chat functionality.

entry.name: google-antigravity
entry.description: Google Antigravity is an "agent-first" development platform that uses autonomous AI agents to plan, write, and test software across your code editor, terminal, and browser.

entry.name: google-search-ai-mode
entry.description: Google Search AI Mode is a feature in Google Search that uses advanced artificial intelligence to enhance the search experience.

entry.name: gost
entry.description: GOST (GO Simple Tunnel) is an open-source network tunneling and proxy tool written in Go that supports multiple protocols like HTTP, SOCKS, and Shadowsocks. It's used to securely forward or relay network traffic through customizable proxy chains.

entry.name: guardtime-federal-ksi
entry.description: Guardtime Federal's Keyless Signature Infrastructure (KSI) is a technology designed to provide immutable, real-time proof of the integrity of digital assets. Unlike traditional security methods that rely on public key infrastructure (PKI) and centralized trusted authorities, KSI uses a distributed blockchain and cryptographic hash functions.

entry.name: hakko-vsft-screen-data-transfer
entry.description: Hakko V-SFT configuration software is used for programming and configuring Monitouch HMI (Human-Machine Interface) devices. This software provides enhanced operability and convenient screen configuration tools, allowing for easy viewing of HMI displays, graphic indication of system configuration, and improved search functionality. Additionally, the Hakko V-SFT software tool can be used to transfer screen data to the Monitouch HMI.

entry.name: hakko-vsft-simulator
entry.description: Hakko V-SFT configuration software is used for programming and configuring Monitouch HMI (Human-Machine Interface) devices. This software provides enhanced operability and convenient screen configuration tools, allowing for easy viewing of HMI displays, graphic indication of system configuration, and improved search functionality. The simulator function of the V-SFT software allows users to perform operation checks on a newly created screen without the HMI or PLC.

entry.name: honeywell-configuration-studio
entry.description: Honeywell Configuration Studio is a software application that provides a central location from which to access engineering tools and applications used to configure Honeywell Experion PKS based systems.

entry.name: honeywell-experion-builder
entry.description: Honeywell Experion Builder is a software application launched from the Honeywell Configuration Studio which can be used to complete configuration tasks for various Honeywell Experion devices.

entry.name: hoptodesk
entry.description: Hoptodesk is a remote desktop tool featuring real end-to-end encrypted traffic.

entry.name: hp-device-manager-polling
entry.description: HP Device Manager (HPDM) is a centralized software application for managing and administering large fleets of HP Thin Clients across a network, allowing IT administrators to inventory, update, configure, and secure these devices remotely from a single console.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-central
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its central server provides services such as license management and other client management functions. This App-ID covers the non-secure version of IBM i Access Client Solutions' central server.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-base
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location.

entry.name: ibm-i-as
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-database
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its database server allows clients access to Db2 for i functions. This App-ID covers the non-secure version of IBM i Access Client Solutions' database server.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-dtaq
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its data queue server provides access to IBM i data queues. This App-ID covers the non-secure version of IBM i Access Client Solutions' data queue server.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-file
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its file server allows clients to store and access objects located on the IBM i file system. This App-ID covers the non-secure version of IBM i Access Client Solutions' file server.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-netprt
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its network print server provides remote print support and allows enhanced client control over print resources. This App-ID covers the non-secure version of IBM i Access Client Solutions' network print server.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-rmtcmd
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its remote command and distributed program call server allows PC applications to issue commands and call programs on IBM i and return the results to the client. This App-ID covers the non-secure version of IBM i Access Client Solutions' remote command and distributed program call server.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-signon
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its signon server provides password management functions for IBM i host servers with sockets support. This App-ID covers the non-secure version of IBM i Access Client Solutions' signon server.

entry.name: ibm-i-as-svrmap
entry.description: IBM i Access Client Solutions provides a platform-independent interface that consolidates the most commonly used tasks for managing IBM i into one simplified location. Its server port mapper provides the current server port number to a client requesting a connection.

entry.name: ifm-efector-iot-core-visualizer
entry.description: Ifm Efector IoT-Core Visualizer acts as an interface that allows sensor data from IO-link masters and other devices to be transmitted to cloud platforms or other IT systems for monitoring, analysis, and control. The ifm IoT Core Visualizer is a web-based tool that allows users to configure the IoT Core functionality of ifm devices, such as what data to send, how to send it, and how to trigger the data transfer.

entry.name: ifm-efector-moneo-configure
entry.description: ifm's moneo is a comprehensive IIoT platform for visualizing, analyzing, and optimizing production processes. moneo configure helps users setup IO-Link sensors and masters, as well as visualize process values and parameters.

entry.name: ifm-efector-plc-web-server
entry.description: Ifm develops, produces, and sells sensors, controllers, software, and systems for industrial automation. Their PLCs have integrated web servers that allow remote access to configure, parameterize, and monitor the device.

entry.name: ifm-pcic
entry.description: ifm develops, produces and sells sensors, controllers, software and systems for industrial automation and for SAP-based solutions for supply chain management and shop floor integration. The ifm process interface (pcic) is used for sending commands to a vision sensor using an ifm specific communication protocol.

entry.name: ifm-vision-assistant
entry.description: The ifm Vision Assistant is a software tool from ifm that simplifies the configuration, monitoring, and parameter setting of ifm vision sensors, including 2D and 3D cameras, barcode readers, and other devices.

entry.name: ifm-vision-discovery
entry.description: ifm is a provider of industrial vision systems and sensors. ifm's discovery protocol is used to locate and identify their devices on the network.

entry.name: kimi
entry.description: Kimi is a productivity tool designed for both students and professionals. It assists users in interpreting academic papers, writing and debugging code, and planning strategies. This tool is particularly useful for those in academic or tech-related fields, providing a new level of quality in productivity tools.

entry.name: lovable
entry.description: Lovable.dev is a software development platform that functions as a superhuman full-stack product engineer. The platform is designed to be instant and intuitive, offering features such as live rendering, image input handling, instant undo, and collaboration through branching. The mission of Lovable.dev is to unlock human potential by building software that builds software, enabling the creation of lovable products in minutes.

entry.name: mcp
entry.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an open protocol that standardizes how applications provide context to LLMs (Large Language Models).

entry.name: mersive-solstice-pod
entry.description: Mersive is a technology company that provides wireless collaboration solutions, with its Solstice Pod enabling seamless content sharing and multi-user interaction in meeting and collaboration spaces. The Mersive Solstice Pod is a collaboration software installed on dedicated hardware, providing wireless content sharing and video conferencing tools for meeting and collaboration spaces.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe-create
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe-base
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe-delete
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe-download
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe-edit
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe-post
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: microsoft-github-ghe-upload
entry.description: GitHub GHE is a GitHub Enterprise Server. It's a self-hosted version of GitHub tailored for organizations that need more control and security over their development workflows.

entry.name: modbus-mei-can-open
entry.description: Modbus is a serial communications protocol published by Modicon in 1979 for use with its programmable logic controllers (PLCs). It has become a de facto standard communications protocol in industry, and is now the most commonly available means of connecting industrial electronic devices. The Modbus protocol is typically used in Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) and Industrial Control System (ICS) applications.

entry.name: modbus-mei-read-device-id
entry.description: Modbus is a serial communications protocol published by Modicon in 1979 for use with its programmable logic controllers (PLCs). It has become a de facto standard communications protocol in industry, and is now the most commonly available means of connecting industrial electronic devices. The Modbus protocol is typically used in Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) and Industrial Control System (ICS) applications.

entry.name: ms-copilot-studio-create
entry.description: Microsoft Copilot Studio is an end-to-end conversational AI platform that empowers you to create and customize copilots using natural language or a graphical interface.

entry.name: murrelektronik-io-webserver
entry.description: Murrelektronik's I/O systems connect actuators and sensors of a system to the control. The I/O systems have an integrated web server for configuration and access to live data and diagnostics.

entry.name: nidec-drive-webserver
entry.description: Nidec Drive is a provider of motors, drives, and control systems for a wide range of applications. They specialize in providing dependable and energy-efficient products and services, particularly for industries like electric vehicles, material handling, and floor care. The Nidec Drive Web Server allows the user to manage and monitor Nidec's devices.

entry.name: nxstage-capsule-ddi
entry.description: NxStage Capsule DDI is the Device Driver Interface (DDI) specifically developed by Philips Capsule (now part of Fresenius Medical Care) to integrate data from the NxStage hemodialysis machines into hospital information systems.

entry.name: omron-fins-bcast-test-data-send
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS broadcast test data send command.

entry.name: omron-fins-bcast-tst-res-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS broadcast test results read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-data-link-stat-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS data link status read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-device-name-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS device name read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-error-log-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS error log read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-file-mem-index-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS file memory index read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-file-memory-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS file memory read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-file-memory-write
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS file memory write command.

entry.name: omron-fins-internode-echo-test
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS internode echo test command.

entry.name: omron-fins-multi-frc-stat-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS multipoint forced status read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-network-status-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS network status read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-reset
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS reset command.

entry.name: omron-fins-sysmac-name-delete
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS sysmac name delete command.

entry.name: omron-fins-sysmac-name-read
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS sysmac name read command.

entry.name: omron-fins-sysmac-name-set
entry.description: FINS, Factory Interface Network Service, is a network protocol used by Omron PLCs, over different physical networks like Ethernet, Controller Link, DeviceNet and RS-232C. This App-ID covers the FINS sysmac name set command.

entry.name: omron-sysmac-studio
entry.description: Omron Sysmac Studio is an integrated development environment (IDE) for designing and programming automated systems using OMRON's Sysmac controllers, such as the NJ/NX Series. It provides a single platform to manage logic, motion control, robotics, safety, and machine vision, supporting standardized programming languages like IEC 61131-3.

entry.name: openai-chatkit
entry.description: OpenAI ChatKit is an official developer framework designed to simplify the process of embedding professional AI chat interfaces into websites and applications.

entry.name: openai-codex
entry.description: Codex, developed by OpenAI, is a suite of AI-powered coding tools designed to assist developers in streamlining their workflows. The application leverages advanced artificial intelligence to perform tasks such as writing code features, answering queries about codebases, debugging, and suggesting pull requests. Codex integrates with cloud and local environments to enhance coding efficiency and productivity.

entry.name: openai-codex-create
entry.description: Codex, developed by OpenAI, is a suite of AI-powered coding tools designed to assist developers in streamlining their workflows. The application leverages advanced artificial intelligence to perform tasks such as writing code features, answering queries about codebases, debugging, and suggesting pull requests. Codex integrates with cloud and local environments to enhance coding efficiency and productivity.

entry.name: openai-codex-share
entry.description: Codex, developed by OpenAI, is a suite of AI-powered coding tools designed to assist developers in streamlining their workflows. The application leverages advanced artificial intelligence to perform tasks such as writing code features, answering queries about codebases, debugging, and suggesting pull requests. Codex integrates with cloud and local environments to enhance coding efficiency and productivity.

entry.name: openclaw
entry.description: OpenClaw (formerly known as Clawdbot or Moltbot) is an open-source Agentic AI framework that transforms standard AI models into an autonomous personal assistant that lives on hardware and operates through existing chat apps. It can proactively run commands, manage calendar, and control computer based on a simple text message.

entry.name: openrouter
entry.description: OpenRouter is an AI-based chatroom platform. It provides a space for users to interact and discuss various topics. The platform's functionality and settings, such as the "max tokens for reasoning" parameter, can be configured according to user preferences, as detailed in the provided documentation. The platform's legitimacy and operation have been discussed and verified by its user community.

entry.name: paloalto-host-compliance-svc
entry.description: HIP, or Host Information Profile, allows administrators to collect information about the security posture of devices accessing their network. Host Compliance Service ensures that HIP can be shared among Palo Alto Network solutions.

entry.name: paloalto-host-discover-svc
entry.description: Host Compliance Discover Service identifies the Host Compliance cloud resources for a firewall.

entry.name: perplexity-ai-create
entry.description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered research and conversational search engine that answers queries using natural language predictive text.

entry.name: perplexity-ai-delete
entry.description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered research and conversational search engine that answers queries using natural language predictive text.

entry.name: perplexity-ai-edit
entry.description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered research and conversational search engine that answers queries using natural language predictive text.

entry.name: perplexity-ai-share
entry.description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered research and conversational search engine that answers queries using natural language predictive text.

entry.name: remsupp
entry.description: RemSupp is a remote desktop solution that provides secure and fast remote access, control, and support for Windows and macOS devices.

entry.name: response-cx-create
entry.description: Response CX is a customer experience platform designed to help direct to consumer (DTC) brands automate and scale support.

entry.name: response-cx-base
entry.description: Response CX is a customer experience platform designed to help direct to consumer (DTC) brands automate and scale support.

entry.name: response-cx
entry.description: Response CX is a customer experience platform designed to help direct to consumer (DTC) brands automate and scale support.

entry.name: response-cx-post
entry.description: Response CX is a customer experience platform designed to help direct to consumer (DTC) brands automate and scale support.

entry.name: response-cx-upload
entry.description: Response CX is a customer experience platform designed to help direct to consumer (DTC) brands automate and scale support.

entry.name: riot-games
entry.description: Riot Games is a video game developer, publisher, and esports tournament organizer best known for creating the global hit League of Legends (LoL).

entry.name: rockwell-aadvance-discovery
entry.description: Rockwell AADvance (Advanced Distributed Architecture for Safety) is a Rockwell Automation distributed, scalable, fault-tolerant control system for high-integrity safety applications. The discovery tool is used to search out over Ethernet to detect what AADvance systems are connected to the network.

entry.name: rockwell-sncp
entry.description: Rockwell Automation's SNCP (Safety Network Control Protocol) is used for communications which includes variable (data) bindings and redundancy features, within Rockwell's AADvance process safety systems.

entry.name: rs-automation-webserver
entry.description: RS Automation is an automation company specializing in various aspects of industrial automation. They develop and manufacture automation components like AC servo drives, PLCs, and motion controllers. Their RS Automation Webserver allows users to manage their various devices.

entry.name: rs-automation-xgpc
entry.description: XGPC is the ladder editing software developed by RS Automation for their X8 Series PLC. It supports the IEC61131-3 standard and provides functions for editing, monitoring, and debugging ladder logic programs.

entry.name: s2-netbox
entry.description: S2 NetBox is an access control and security management system developed by S2 Security. It is designed to provide security solutions for organizations and industries. Devices communicate between an S2 Network Controller and S2 Network Nodes.

entry.name: schneider-ftp
entry.description: Schneider Electric is a global technology company that provides energy management and automation solutions for homes, buildings, data centers, infrastructure, and industries. Schneider Electric products, including those in the EcoStruxure and APC lines, use FTP for tasks like upgrading and downgrading PLC firmware.

entry.name: schweitzer-eng-lab-telnet
entry.description: Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories (SEL) devices use telnet for remote access and communication over the network. Telnet allows users to access SEL device settings, metering, event reports, and other functions.

entry.name: schweitzer-eng-lab-webserver
entry.description: Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories (SEL) devices have integrated web servers that allow for remote access and management of the devices via a web browser.

entry.name: secomea-appliance-launcher
entry.description: The Secomea Appliance Launcher is an application provided by Secomea that simplifies the initial configuration and connection to SiteManager appliances. It is designed for easy setup of Secomea's remote access solution for industrial equipment.

entry.name: sensetime-sensemirage-download
entry.description: SenseMirage is an AI "painting" app by SenseTime that transforms text prompts into stylized imagery using a large transformer-diffusion model.

entry.name: sensetime-sensemirage-base
entry.description: SenseMirage is an AI "painting" app by SenseTime that transforms text prompts into stylized imagery using a large transformer-diffusion model.

entry.name: sensetime-sensemirage
entry.description: SenseMirage is an AI "painting" app by SenseTime that transforms text prompts into stylized imagery using a large transformer-diffusion model.

entry.name: sensetime-sensemirage-post
entry.description: SenseMirage is an AI "painting" app by SenseTime that transforms text prompts into stylized imagery using a large transformer-diffusion model.

entry.name: sensetime-sensemirage-upload
entry.description: SenseMirage is an AI "painting" app by SenseTime that transforms text prompts into stylized imagery using a large transformer-diffusion model.

entry.name: service-now-create
entry.description: ServiceNow is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) provider of IT service management (ITSM) software.

entry.name: service-now-delete
entry.description: ServiceNow is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) provider of IT service management (ITSM) software.

entry.name: sick-cola2
entry.description: CoLa2 (Command Language 2) is a protocol from SICK, with which a client can access suitable SICK sensors via a network.

entry.name: sick-safety-discovery
entry.description: SICK Safety Designer is a configuration software used for design and configuration of safety functions across various SICK safety controllers and devices. The software searches for devices using the Sick Safety Designer Discovery Protocol.

entry.name: sick-sopas-auto-ip-scan
entry.description: SICK is one of the world's leading solutions providers for sensor-based applications in the industrial sector. SOPAS (SICK Open Portal for Applications and Systems) is the protocol for the sensors. SOPAS Auto IP Scan is used for discovering SICK sensors.

entry.name: sick-sopas-camera
entry.description: SICK is one of the world's leading solutions providers for sensor-based applications in the industrial sector. The SICK SOPAS (SICK Open Portal for Applications and Systems) Engineering Tool allows users to use the cameras on SICK barcode readers.

entry.name: sick-sopas-cola-b
entry.description: The SOPAS (SICK Open Portal for Applications and Systems) protocol is used to communicate with sensor devices from SICK. SOPAS utilizes command strings (telegrams) and comes in two protocol formats: Cola A (Command Language A) with ASCII telegram format, and Cola B with binary telegram format. This App-ID covers SICK SOPAS Cola B traffic.

entry.name: siemens-s7-block-status-v2
entry.description: This App-ID covers the block status v2 function for the Siemens-S7 protocol.

entry.name: siemens-s7-breakpoint
entry.description: This App-ID covers the breakpoint function for the Siemens-S7 protocol.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-abort
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-add-link
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-begin-seq
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-error
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-error-2
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-get-var
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-get-var-ad
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-init-ssl
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-rem-link
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-comm-plus-set-var-st
entry.description: The S7 Comm Plus protocol is a new version of the original S7 Comm protocol. It is a proprietary communications protocol developed by Siemens that runs between programmable logic controllers (PLCs) of the Siemens S7 family.

entry.name: siemens-s7-memory-reset
entry.description: This App-ID covers the memory reset function for the Siemens-S7 protocol.

entry.name: siemens-s7-mode-transition
entry.description: This App-ID covers the mode transition function for the Siemens-S7 protocol.

entry.name: sonyliv
entry.description: SonyLIV is an Indian subscription-based streaming service launched in 2013. The platform streams live sports, original titles, films, TV shows, and series, as well as licensed content from third parties.

entry.name: spell
entry.description: Spell allows users to delegate their tasks to autonomous AI agents and transform their daily work with AI tools.

entry.name: superhuman
entry.description: Superhuman is an email app designed to quickly resolve, respond to, and categorize emails. It features keyboard shortcuts to automatically sort, as well as an AI to automatically reply to emails appropriately.

entry.name: talkscriber-invite
entry.description: Talkscriber is an advanced AI-driven speech-to-text platform designed to provide high-accuracy transcription services with additional features such as emotion detection and purchase intent identification.

entry.name: talkscriber-base
entry.description: Talkscriber is an advanced AI-driven speech-to-text platform designed to provide high-accuracy transcription services with additional features such as emotion detection and purchase intent identification.

entry.name: talkscriber
entry.description: Talkscriber is an advanced AI-driven speech-to-text platform designed to provide high-accuracy transcription services with additional features such as emotion detection and purchase intent identification.

entry.name: tavily
entry.description: Tavily is a search engine specifically designed for AI agents. It provides real-time, accurate results, intelligent query suggestions, and in-depth research capabilities. Tavily uses API keys for authentication, ensuring secure access to its endpoints. The platform also offers comprehensive documentation and tutorials for users, encouraging discussion and suggestions for improvements.

entry.name: tencent-yuanbao-create
entry.description: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI productivity app that assists with writing, translation, programming, information search, and document summarization.

entry.name: tencent-yuanbao-base
entry.description: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI productivity app that assists with writing, translation, programming, information search, and document summarization.

entry.name: tencent-yuanbao
entry.description: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI productivity app that assists with writing, translation, programming, information search, and document summarization.

entry.name: tencent-yuanbao-delete
entry.description: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI productivity app that assists with writing, translation, programming, information search, and document summarization.

entry.name: tencent-yuanbao-edit
entry.description: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI productivity app that assists with writing, translation, programming, information search, and document summarization.

entry.name: tencent-yuanbao-move
entry.description: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI productivity app that assists with writing, translation, programming, information search, and document summarization.

entry.name: tencent-yuanbao-upload
entry.description: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI productivity app that assists with writing, translation, programming, information search, and document summarization.

entry.name: testdriver-create
entry.description: TestDriver is a computer-use agent for QA testing of user interfaces.

entry.name: testdriver-base
entry.description: TestDriver is a computer-use agent for QA testing of user interfaces.

entry.name: testdriver
entry.description: TestDriver is a computer-use agent for QA testing of user interfaces.

entry.name: testdriver-delete
entry.description: TestDriver is a computer-use agent for QA testing of user interfaces.

entry.name: testdriver-edit
entry.description: TestDriver is a computer-use agent for QA testing of user interfaces.

entry.name: testdriver-invite
entry.description: TestDriver is a computer-use agent for QA testing of user interfaces.

entry.name: turck-device-discovery
entry.description: As a specialist in sensor, fieldbus, and connectivity - as well as interface technology, human-machine interfaces (HMI), and RFID systems - Turck offers efficient solutions for factory and process automation applications. The Turck Device Discovery protocol is used to scan the network for Turck devices using software like PACTware or Turck Automation Suite.

entry.name: turck-hmi-plc-webserver
entry.description: Turck HMI/PLCs are often used in applications like logistics, manufacturing, packaging, and other industries where automated processes require visualization and control. The Turck HMI/PLC webserver is used for remote monitoring, control, and maintenance.

entry.name: turck-io-service
entry.description: Turck offers a complete line of industrial Ethernet products, including on-machine, in-cabinet, block, and modular I/O. The multiprotocol technology by Turck is an innovative new approach to Ethernet distributed I/O; multiprotocol I/O devices automatically self-configure to the active fieldbus protocol on each power-up.

entry.name: tusk
entry.description: Tusk is an AI-powered tool that helps developers generate unit and integration tests with codebase context.

entry.name: uneeq-digital-humans
entry.description: UneeQ Digital Humans is an AI interface company that specializes in creating lifelike digital human avatars for enterprises.

entry.name: versa-networks-secure-sd-wan
entry.description: Versa Secure SD-WAN provides end-to-end connectivity, visibility, control, and security for enterprise-level digital transformation. It integrates software-defined networking and advanced security services into a single platform. This App-ID covers VXLAN communication between VOS hub, VOS branch, and Controller device.

entry.name: wago-service
entry.description: WAGO offers various services and updates to keep its industrial automation products, particularly its Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), up-to-date and functioning optimally. This includes firmware updates, software updates, and remote access and management capabilities.

entry.name: wago-web-server
entry.description: WAGO is a global leader in electrical interconnection, interface electronics, and automation technology. WAGO programmable logic controllers (PLCs) and other automation devices have internal web servers that allow users to access and manage the device through a web browser.

entry.name: web3gpt-post
entry.description: Web3GPT is an AI-powered platform transforming smart contract development and deployment.

entry.name: web3gpt-base
entry.description: Web3GPT is an AI-powered platform transforming smart contract development and deployment.

entry.name: web3gpt
entry.description: Web3GPT is an AI-powered platform transforming smart contract development and deployment.

entry.name: webex-calling
entry.description: Webex Calling is Cisco's cloud-based phone system (a cloud PBX) that lets businesses make and receive calls on desk phones, computers, and mobile devices.

entry.name: weintek-easyweb
entry.description: Weintek Easyweb 2.0 is a web interface that allows users to configure parameters of the cMT X Series HMI. Additionally, with its Webview feature, users can monitor HMIs through a web browser.

entry.name: weintek-hmi-discovery
entry.description: EasyBuilder Pro is a versatile HMI software platform developed by Weintek exclusively for their HMI devices. It allows users to easily manage and configure Weintek HMI products. EasyBuilder Pro uses Weintek HMI Discovery to find HMIs in the network.
